prompt: The following imputed VCF record shows two samples. For each sample, convert the dosage (DS) to an expected alternate allele count interpretation. Which sample is more likely to be homozygous alternate?
context:
#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO	FORMAT	IRIS_550	IRIS_551
chr09	14820341	.	C	T	.	.	DR2=0.91;AF=0.38	GT:DS:GP	1/1:1.87:0.01,0.11,0.88	0/1:1.22:0.05,0.68,0.27
correct_answer: IRIS_550 is more likely homozygous alternate. DS=1.87 is close to 2.0 (expected for hom-alt), with GP(1/1)=0.88. IRIS_551 has DS=1.22, closer to 1.0 (expected for het), with GP(0/1)=0.68. DS ranges: 0=hom-ref, 1=het, 2=hom-alt.
rubric: Must identify IRIS_550 as more likely hom-alt. Must explain DS scale (0-2) and connect DS values to expected genotype categories.
notes: Tests dosage interpretation as expected alternate allele count.
